title: Process for Proving Theorems in Discrete Mathematics
description: A flowchart illustrating the logical progression from foundational definitions to a formal proof of a theorem.
relationships: Definitions and Axioms form the foundation
Given Information provides the starting assumptions
Logical Deductions apply rules of inference to the foundation and givens
Deductions may first prove supporting Lemmas
The sequence of deductions leads to the Theorem Statement being true
This culminates in the Proof Conclusion
